productDisplayName: Baggit Women Sanjara Jhuti Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 17 cm Crafted from jute A buttonable flap Six card holders, one zippered pocket and two pockets Six card holder slots and one pocket on the flap A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
